communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Signed memorandum of understanding with Scouting America, as referenced in the Secretary's remarks of February 27, 2026

See https://www.war.gov/News/News-Stories/Article/Article/4417012/hegseth-says-scouting-america-support-to-continue-upon-orgs-commitment-to-drop/

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ansel Halliburton

communications.subject: North Carolina Public Records Law Request: Records Request
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the North Carolina Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I respectfully request access to and copies of all records related to the procurement associated with:
•	Solicitation/Bid: RFP NO. 200-CAMERA-09192025-CR
•	Title/Description: Student Transportation Camera Replacement For a 5-Year Term
•	Issuing Entity: Johnston County Public Schools
Specifically, I am requesting:
•	All proposals and responses submitted by all vendors.
•	All contracts, agreements, amendments, and pricing schedules resulting from this solicitation.
•	All evaluation materials, including scoring sheets, evaluation committee notes or summaries, and recommendation memoranda.
•	All bid tabulations, comparison matrices, or award justifications.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Jon Smith
